solution:
# INFRATEST ANALYSIS

## 1. What This Project/System Is
Manufacturing and testing equipment company specializing in materials testing technology (asphalt, concrete, soils).

## 2. Key Components
- **Primary Web Domain**: infratestusa.com (company info/marketing)
- **Secondary Domain**: infratest.net/en/ (product catalog - appears non-functional)
- **Product Listing**: Third-party reseller (gtssi.net) hosting product quotes
- **Product Example**: Infratest Asphalt Analyzer (closed-loop extraction unit)

## 3. Issues / Risks
- **infratest.net/en/ Non-Functional**: "No products were found matching your selection" - catalog inaccessible
- **No Direct E-Commerce**: Products sold through third-party resellers only
- **Outdated Certifications**: ISO 9001:2000 and ISO 14001 listed (superseded by 2015/2018 versions)
- **Limited Web Presence**: Only 2 primary domains identified; minimal SEO/search visibility for direct sales
- **Product Information Fragmented**: Incomplete product descriptions on reseller sites

## 4. Improvements / Next Steps
- Restore infratest.net product catalog functionality
- Implement direct e-commerce platform or integrate existing one
- Update ISO certification references to current versions
- Consolidate product information across domains
- Establish product documentation/specification database
- Review domain strategy (consolidate or clarify purpose of each)
